## Overview

**v0.3.0 — macOS officially shipped, Windows feature parity.**

This is the first release where TildaZ runs on macOS as a fully-featured
peer to the Windows build. The macOS native backend, multi-tab UI, color
emoji rendering, IME, autostart, and a universal-binary DMG installer all
land together. Windows gets a matching set of polish (color emoji parity
with Windows Terminal, ZWJ family rendering, tab-rename paste fix, prev/next
tab shortcuts, single-tab layout fix, font-family chain validation).

The minor-version bump (0.2 → 0.3) marks the transition from "Windows with
experimental macOS" to a real cross-platform terminal.

## Downloads

| Platform | File | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Windows | `tildaz-v0.3.0-windows.zip` | unzip anywhere. Includes `tildaz.exe` + bundled ConPTY runtime. |
| macOS (universal) | `tildaz-v0.3.0-macos.dmg` | Apple Silicon + Intel single binary. Drag `TildaZ.app` into Applications. macOS 13 Ventura or later. |

First-launch on macOS: the app is ad-hoc signed, so macOS may block the
first open. Right-click `TildaZ.app` → Open, or run
`xattr -d com.apple.quarantine /Applications/TildaZ.app`. Then grant
Accessibility + Input Monitoring permissions once.

## What's new since v0.2.13

### macOS — first-class platform

Most macOS work landed across the v0.2.x line; v0.3.0 is the first stable
release that bundles all of it.

- **Native multi-tab UI** — tab bar with drag-reorder, double-click rename,
  IME inline preedit, scrollbar drag, drag-select auto-copy
  ([#111](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/111),
  [#122](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/122),
  [#123](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/123)).
- **CoreText + Metal rendering** — retina (2x) glyph atlas, color emoji
  via `CTFontCreateForString` system fallback, BGRA8 atlas with proper
  premultiplied alpha ([#132](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/132)).
- **POSIX PTY** — `openpty` + `login_tty` + IUTF8 termios. SIGHUP-ignoring
  shells (`nohup`, `trap '' HUP`) get killed with `SIGKILL` after a 500 ms
  grace, so closing a tab never hangs
  ([#129](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/129)).
- **LaunchAgent autostart** —
  `~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.tildaz.app.plist` with `RunAtLoad=true`,
  the macOS equivalent of Windows' Registry Run entry
  ([#126](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/126)).
- **Logs** — `~/Library/Logs/tildaz.log`, picked up by Console.app
  automatically ([#124](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/124)).
- **Universal DMG installer** — single `tildaz-vX.Y.Z-macos.dmg` containing
  a `TildaZ.app` whose `MacOS/tildaz` is a `lipo`-merged arm64 + x86_64
  binary. Replaces the older per-arch zip
  ([#133](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/133)).
- **Right-click paste** unified across both platforms
  ([#119](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/119)).

### Windows — color emoji parity with Windows Terminal

A multi-step rewrite of the Windows color-emoji path landed this cycle.
The end-to-end pipeline now matches Windows Terminal's `BackendD3D` with
hardware antialiasing.

- **Direct2D D3D11-backed render target** — `CreateDxgiSurfaceRenderTarget`
  on the atlas texture itself, layer-by-layer `DrawGlyphRun` with grayscale
  antialias and `SetTextRenderingParams(gamma=1.0)`, premultiplied BGRA in
  the atlas, dual-source blend in the shader (`SRC0=rgba`, `SRC1=aaaa`).
  ([#136](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/136)).
- **Six WT-equivalent precision fixes**: atlas direct-draw,
  `SetUnitMode(PIXELS)` + `GetGlyphRunWorldBounds`, brush reuse,
  `IDWriteFactory4` + `DrawColorBitmapGlyphRun` for PNG / SVG bitmap
  emoji fonts ([#137](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/137)).
- **Family ZWJ emoji** (`👨‍👩‍👧` etc.) — the visual is a multi-glyph
  cluster + per-glyph advance/offset (negative offsets pull the parts into
  one composite). We now call `IDWriteTextAnalyzer.GetGlyphPlacements` and
  pass the result through to `DWRITE_GLYPH_RUN`, matching Windows Terminal
  ([#139](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/139)).
- **Grapheme cluster shaping** end-to-end — `IDWriteTextAnalyzer.GetGlyphs`
  on each grapheme, with Cascadia primary + Segoe UI Emoji fallback
  ([#134](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/134)).
- **font.family** array now actually applied — the chain was previously
  capped at the primary entry and silent-fallbacked to Consolas on
  unrecognized names ([#135](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/135)).

### Cross-platform polish

- **Quit confirmation** — `Cmd+Q` (macOS) and `Alt+F4` (Windows) now show
  a confirmation dialog with the open-tab count. Default button is Cancel
  so an accidental Enter keystroke can't terminate. `Cmd+W` /
  `Ctrl+Shift+W` (close tab) keeps its existing instant behavior — that
  path is an explicit "close this tab" intent
  ([#116](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/116)).
- **Tab bar overflow** — when tabs no longer fit, the viewport
  auto-scrolls to keep the active tab visible (Chrome minimum-move
  pattern). Firefox-style `<` / `>` arrow buttons appear at the edges
  for manual scroll, and the `+` button stays pinned next to the right
  arrow. Tab width remains a fixed 150pt — no squish
  ([#117](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/117)).
- **Tab rename paste** — pressing `Ctrl+Shift+V` (Windows) / `Cmd+V`
  (macOS) while renaming a tab now inserts the clipboard text into the
  tab name buffer instead of leaking through to the PTY
  ([#142](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/142)).
- **Prev / next tab shortcuts** — `Ctrl+Shift+[` / `Ctrl+Shift+]`
  (Windows) and `Shift+Cmd+[` / `Shift+Cmd+]` (macOS), matching the
  pattern used by VS Code and Chrome
  ([#125](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/125)).
- **Explicit copy shortcut** — `Ctrl+Shift+C` (Windows) / `Cmd+C`
  (macOS). Drag-select still auto-copies; this shortcut lets you
  re-trigger after an inadvertent click loses the selection
  ([#120](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/120)).
- **About dialog** — `Ctrl+Shift+I` (Windows) / `Shift+Cmd+I` (macOS).
  Body shows version, exe path, pid, config path, log path. Selection
  auto-copies to the clipboard so you can paste a path straight into
  Explorer / Finder / `cd` ([#128](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/128)).
- **Single-tab layout fix (Windows)** — when only one tab is open, the
  tab bar reserves zero height (matching macOS), and the cell area
  re-syncs on the 1↔N transition so terminal `cols × rows` stays
  consistent ([#127](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/127)).

## Known issues

- **[#141](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/141)** — pasting a
  family ZWJ emoji many times in rapid succession can produce visual
  glitches; symptom not fully characterized yet, deferred follow-up.
- **[#144](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/144)** — at high
  zoom, anti-aliasing edges and color-channel transitions are still
  microscopically rougher than Windows Terminal. Not a release blocker.
- **[#109](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/109)** — macOS
  Developer ID code signing is environment-limited (corporate keychain
  policy). Releases are ad-hoc signed; first-launch quarantine clearance
  is documented in the macOS install instructions above.
- **[#19](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/19)** — `-Dsimd=true`
  build still fails on Windows due to a Zig 0.15 + ghostty-vt C++
  include-path interaction. Default builds (without `-Dsimd`) are
  unaffected.

## Verification

- [ ] Apple Silicon: DMG mounts, `TildaZ.app` opens after quarantine
      clearance, both Apple Silicon and Intel slices present
      (`lipo -info`).
- [ ] Intel Mac: same DMG runs natively.
- [ ] Windows 10 / 11: zip extract, double-click `tildaz.exe`, F12
      drop-down toggle works, ConPTY child process spawns.
- [ ] Family ZWJ emoji `👨‍👩‍👧` paste — single composite visual on both
      platforms.
- [ ] Tab rename `Ctrl+Shift+V` / `Cmd+V` — paste lands in the tab
      name buffer.
- [ ] Quit dialog appears on `Cmd+Q` / `Alt+F4`, default = Cancel.
